name: The Cavendish Hotel
content: I visited in late April, which I think is right before the tourist season starts in Eastbourne. The reason I believe this to be the case is that I booked a room for under £40. The service was…what you would expect with a £40 hotel room, but quite frankly I was a student at the time and you can't really beat a roof and a bed for £40 a night.
